# browser-mcp — llms-full.txt

Browser automation MCP server. Playwright-based page control (Chrome),
cross-browser bookmark management (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Brave),
and agentic browsing workflows.

## Tools

### Browser control (9 tools — individual)
- `browse_page(url, headless)` — Navigate to URL, extract visible text
- `click_element(selector, headless)` — Click by CSS selector
- `extract_text(selector, headless)` — Extract inner text
- `screenshot(headless)` — Viewport PNG screenshot as base64
- `fill_input(selector, text, headless)` — Type into input
- `press_key(key, headless)` — Press keyboard key
- `close_browser()` — Release Playwright resources
- `list_browsers()` — Detect installed browsers + Firefox profiles
- `browse_url_cli(url, browser)` — Headless CLI mode (no Playwright)

### Bookmark management (portmanteau — 17+ operations)
- `browser_bookmarks(operation, browser, ...)` — CRUD, search, sync, dedupe, tags, analytics across Chrome/Firefox/Edge/Brave

### Workflows (3 tools)
- `morning_briefing(config, headless, max_pages)` — Daily browsing routine from JSON config
- `browse_items(items_json, task, headless, max_items)` — Batch browse from JSON array
- `browse_workflow(task, initial_url, headless, max_steps)` — Multi-step agentic browsing

## API Endpoints
- `GET /health` — Server status, version, port
- `GET /api/v1/diagnostics` — CUA smoke test diagnostics
- `GET /metrics` — Prometheus metrics
- `POST /mcp` — FastMCP HTTP transport

## Configuration
| Env | Default | Description |
|-----|---------|-------------|
| `BROWSER_MCP_PORT` | `10776` | HTTP server port |
| `BROWSER_MCP_TAURI` | — | Set `1` for Tauri desktop |
| `MCP_BRIDGE_URLS` | — | Comma-separated upstream proxy URLs |

## Transports
- **stdio**: Default (Claude Desktop)
- **HTTP**: Set `MCP_PORT` or `BROWSER_MCP_PORT`
- **MCP bridge**: `MCP_BRIDGE_URLS` for upstream proxies

## NSIS Installer
`native/` directory with Tauri 2.0 wrapper, PyInstaller backend, CUA smoke test.
`just build-native` to build, `just cua-nsis-test` to certify.
